feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Brazil Tax Reform - NF-e Technical Note 2024.002 and DF-e Technical Note 2024.001
entry.content:
Customer would like to know when SAP intends to provide more technical details about Brazil Tax Reform. According to the customer, Brazil Government has issued Technical Notes and customer needs to understand the impacts in the system.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to enable BOM material on sales order item and print it?
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

Our client would like to know how to enable BOM material on the sales order item level and the same on the print layout.

Kindly advise.
Thanks!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to Create And Add Custom Fields to SAP S/4HANA Cloud OData API Entities
entry.content:
Hi All, 

How to Create And Add Custom Fields to SAP S/4HANA Cloud OData API Entities?

API: Condition Record for Pricing in Sales
  • Sales: Pricing Communication Head (SD_PRICECOMHEAD)
  • Sales: Pricing Communication Item (SD_PRICECOMITEM)

    I use "Custom Fields"  to create and publish a new custom filed in SD_PRICECOMITEM, and use "Adapt UI" to add it in "Manage Price - Sales" .

    When I maintain this field and save this step in UI, I couldn't see any value in custom filed on  "API_SLSPRICINGCONDITIONRECORD_SRV".

     

     What's the next step I should do?

    I don't know how to map this custom field to the correct target table if I need to add a bapi or other method.

     

     

     

     

    Thanks,

    Eric

entry.title: SAP Ariba Integration with S/4HANA Public Cloud for Business Partner replication using SOAP API's
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

we are integrated from Ariba to S/4 HANA Public Cloud using SOAP APIs using Managed Gateways Passthrough integration via BTP Master Data Integration.

  • We are created Instances services as Master Data Integration and Subscription services as Master Data Integration (Orchestration).
  • We have use this JSON below to create the service instance.

 

{
    "application": "s4",
    "businessSystemId": "<businessSystemId>", //Business System ID is SAP S/4HANA Cloud system this value is can be found under Communication systems tile and then filter by Own System.
    "enableTenantDeletion": false,
    "globalTenantId": "<subaccount Id under Service Key>",
    "logSys": "<Same logsys configure in S4PC>",
    "writePermissions": [
        {
            "entityType": "sap.odm.businesspartner.BusinessPartner"
        },
        {
            "entityType": "sap.odm.businesspartner.BusinessPartnerRelationship"
        }
    ],
    "xs-security": {
        "xsappname": "<a unique v4 UUID can be used>",
        "authorities": [
            "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.BPCommonRead",
            "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.BPSensitiveDataRead"
        ]
    }
}

 

  • Created new project in managed gateway to connection from Managed Gateway to MDI (BTP). We are encountering a 404 error while testing the connection. 

    Configure in CIG inbound URL is https://<one-mds.cfapps.<region>.hana.ondemand.com>/businesspartner/v0/soap/BusinessPartnerBulkReplicateRequestIn?tenantId=<identityzone>

    For basic authentication, specify the following:
    User: Value of clientid from the Service key
    Password: Value of clientsecret from the Service key
  • While triggering business partner replication from S4PC its successfully reaching BTP but not in Ariba (Manage Gateway).
  • How to send master data from MDI to Ariba solution?
  • Can you please share configuration guide for this?

Could you please help me on this Integration connection.

Below are the links we referenced and created the MDI integration.

About Supplier Data Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Using SAP Master Data Integration | SAP Help Portal

Configuring SOAP Outbound Destinations to the SAP Integration Suite, managed gateway for spend management and SAP Business Network in SAP Master Data Integration | SAP Help Portal

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/configuring-sap-master-data-integration-service-for-business-partner/ba-p/13543017

Thanks & Regards,

Thouheed

entry.title: Control of user's data entry
entry.content:
User is requested to restrict the data entry for different users by hiding the tabs in product/ supplier master. Can the IMG configuration of “Maintain Field Selection for Data screens” and “Assign Fields to Field Selection Groups” in S4hana cloud public edition achieve this purpose?

 

Or any workaround that similar as ECC can hide tabs in product/ customer/ supplier master to control users’ data entry?

entry.title: Setting of price condition type for fast entry
entry.content: Although there is configuration available in IMG of “condition type for fast entry” for the PPR0 price, the system still not allow the fast entry of sales price field in “Manage sales order – version 2” app

entry.title: Inbound/outbound delivery enquiries
entry.content:
Can inbound delivery generate inspection lot? 

Besides, why the picking status is “not yet picked” in the outbound delivery but the output status of “delivery picking list” is still shown as “completed”? How to release the output status, so the changes update can also be reflected in the output document?

entry.title: not capturing any steps in custom logic tracing app
entry.content:
Hi,

Any idea what possible reason could be for not capturing any steps in custom logic tracing app.

I have added a custom field in "market segment actual "app and then written logic using custom logic app to fetch data using based on customer master. But while tracing logic, no records are getting captured.

Any input on this, is highly appreciated. Attaching the screenshot for reference.

Regards,

Jagadhatri

Regards,

Jagadhatri

entry.title: How do I maintain 2 hyperlinks in the email templates for SES approval specific to QAS and PROD
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

We have a requirement to set up mail notifications for the approvers of the SES workflow. The E-mail template should also consists of a hyperlink directing the approver to the 'My inbox application'.

We've set up the template with the hyperlink to the 'My Inbox' app in QAS for testing purpose. The test results are as expected but now we want to move this change to the Production server via "Import/Export software collection".

Our concern is that the transportation will move the same link to the QAS server in production as well. But we want to have two sets of links in QAS and PROD in the mail templates specific to the environment. Can you please recommend the best practice on how to go about doing this?

Thank you.

Best regards,

Rishav.

entry.title: Batch Characteristics Field Non-Editable
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

One of our Manufacturing client is using Batch Management. We are transferring batch characteristics values from one batch to another batch through Batch Derivation. 

Initially the Batch is created with all the characteristics values & assigned to a production order of a SFG material. Now we are flowing the Batch Characteristics values to the FG production Order through Batch derivation.

The requirement is, once the batch is created & assigned to a production order, few selected batch characteristics values should be non editable in the SFG Production Order as well as when the FG Production Order for which the Batch characteristics are copied through batch derivation.

Please suggest how few values of batch characteristics can be kept non-editable & few values editable. 

 

Regards

Akshay

entry.title: Deleting Business Users
entry.content:
1) Need to delete all users data permanently from Test system. Please suggest us how to delete all business users?

2) Need to import new business users in Test system. Please suggest us how to upload users in Manage workforce tile?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is there any tool like SAP DART for public cloud?
entry.content: Is there any tool like SAP DART for public cloud?

entry.title: Route Schedule in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

We are migrating a customer from S4 On Prem to Public Cloud and currently they maintain Route Schedule (standard functionality in On Prem/Private).

The field is available in the Sales Order (Schedule Line item - Shipping tab) and in the Delivery document, however I cannot find where this is maintained in CBC or in "Implementation Activities" configuration.

Please let me know if this is not available in S4PC at this time and if there is any similar alternative.

Thanks,

Rafael Silva

entry.title: Custom Field in Master Form
entry.content:
I´m trying to extract a field that is not available in the form. Therefore, I created a cds + custom field and then a custom logic. Well, I´m able to create the custom field in the content form, but is possible to create the custom field in the master form? 

Thanks.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: How to expose custom fields of Quality Notifications in SAP S4HANA Cloud public edition?
entry.content:
Hello everyone, 

Maye I ask if it is possible to expose a CDS projection view as an API?

My problem is that the Quality Notification API in SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition https://api.sap.com/api/CE_QUALITYNOTIFICATION_0001/overview / https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0629fd486efa4d339f8b10603b6f1e3f/454808498fc344a8a08b912503d90ac0.html?locale=en-US does not allow extensibility.

Thus, custom fields added to the Quality Notification (business context: Quality Management: Quality Info Record in Procurement (QM_QUALITYINPROCUREMENT) can not be read by the Quality Notification API (and no config is there in the "custom fields" app to enable the custom field for the Quality notification API):

On the other hand, CDS view "I_QUALITYINPROCUREMENTTP_2" allows to show the custom field as shown below: 

So I was thinking of creating a service definition and then an OData service binding for it, to be able to query the CDS view from a 3rd party system and from postman.

The service definition is being created correctly: 

But no service binding can be generated: 

Would this be possible? Someone can help suggest how to expose the custom fields of quality notification level with an API so that a 3rd party system can read the data?

By the way, EML coding allows to read the custom fields, but my problem is that we need to read the quality notification custom fields with an API (???) from CPI in a new iFlow that needs to be developed: 

Thank you

entry.title: How to create a service order when there is no billing
entry.content:
Hi,Expert！

In SAP Public Cloud 2408, I know that there is a line item category "SrvItm (non-bill)" in service orders. 
The understanding is that this will prevent billing registration from occurring for the service order items. 

Is it possible to set the following line item categories to not billing?
・External Service Item
・Stock Service Parts
・Expense Item 

If I want to process the above three item categories without invoicing(non billing), how should I set it up?

entry.title: Batch Validation/check during Sales Delivery
entry.content:
Hi,

We have Requirement of that Expired batch and batch with shelf life less than 1 year should not pick during the batch determiantion in Sales Delivery.

How we can achive this in standard of public cloud?

entry.title: How to block supplier of service employee
entry.content:
Hi. I need your help. 

I would like to know how to block supplier of service employee.

I have ticked all the block indicators of the supplier in Maintain Business Partner app. But it still can be registered as a contract supplier for a service employee.

entry.title: Payment reversed but still status is showing as waiting for approval
entry.content:
Payment document is reversed. The status of the payment batch is "In Approval".


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Purchase order date
entry.content:
Hello experts,


I have the following question regarding the purchase order date.


The purchase order date is the creation date, which is also the date that appears on the purchasing document sent to the supplier.
My customer wants the PO approval date to appear on the document sent to the supplier, instead of the PO creation date.
In other words, the purchase order should be sent with the date on which it was approved, not the date on which it was created.


Is there a way to do this?


Thank you in advance.
